zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry FitzGerrold於大約1175年出生在英國波克夏金斯頓 李爾時，他的父親Henry FitzGerold37歲，母親matilda de chesney31歲。他於1215年與Ermentrude Talbot在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, England: 英国波克夏金斯頓 李爾
zh-hans.Mundford, Norfolk, England: 英国諾福爾可蒙德福德
zh-hans.Deddington, Woodstock, Oxfordshire, Engl: 英国英格兰奧可福爾迪丁頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry FitzGerrold于大约1175年出生在英国波克夏金斯頓 李爾时，他的父亲Henry FitzGerold37岁，母亲matilda de chesney31岁。他于1215年与Ermentrude Talbot在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry FitzGerrold was born about 1175, in Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, England, his father, Henry FitzGerold, was 37 and his mother, matilda de chesney, was 31. He married Ermentrude Talbot in 1215, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry FitzGerrold est né environ 1175, à Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, Angleterre, son père, Henry FitzGerold, avait 37 ans et sa mère, matilda de chesney, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Ermentrude Talbot en 1215, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry FitzGerrold um 1175 in Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry FitzGerold 37 und seine Mutter matilda de chesney 31. Er hat 1215 in England, United Kingdom Ermentrude Talbot geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry FitzGerrold è nato il circa 1175 nel Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, England, il suo padre, Henry FitzGerold, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, matilda de chesney, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Ermentrude Talbot nel 1215, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.Mundford, Norfolk, England: イギリスノーフォルクムンドフォード

ja.lifeSummary: Henry FitzGerroldが約1175年にイギリスバークシュアイアキングストン リスルで生まれた時，父Henry FitzGeroldは37歳，母matilda de chesneyは31歳であった。1215年にイギリスイギリスでErmentrude Talbotと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry FitzGerrold(이)가 대략 1175년 영국 버크실르 킨그스턴 리슬일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry FitzGerold(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 matilda de chesney(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1215년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Ermentrude Talbot(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

mn.Deddington, Woodstock, Oxfordshire, Engl: Deddington, Oxenaford, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry FitzGerrold nasceu aproximadamente 1175, em Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry FitzGerold, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, matilda de chesney, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Ermentrude Talbot em 1215, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry FitzGerrold родился около 1175 г. в местности кингстон лисл, биркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry FitzGerold было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали matilda de chesney, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Ermentrude Talbot в 1215 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry FitzGerrold nació aproximadamente 1175, en Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry FitzGerold, tenía 37 años y su mamá, matilda de chesney, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Ermentrude Talbot en 1215, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en su pueblo.
